message:
Fix group chat name resolution for iMessage

Group chat titles contain commas, ampersands, and "X others" text which
failed the looksLikePhoneNumber check. Instead of checking the title
format, check whether participants have phone numbers that appear in
the title — this correctly identifies auto-generated phone-number titles
vs intentionally named groups.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
